zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Allyn Teague於大約1505年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾可藍費爾德時，他的父親Ralph Allen21歲，母親Eleanor R Burton26歲。他於1519年與Mrs. Allen在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾多尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1584年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾享年80歲。

nameMeanings.name: Teague
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and Cornish: descriptive nickname from Welsh teg or possibly Cornish tek ‘fair, beautiful’. There has been considerable confusion between the Welsh and Irish names, both in Wales and Ireland.

variants.name: Tighe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Nuala.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Taidhg ‘descendant of Tadhg’, a byname meaning ‘bard, poet’, ‘philosopher’. Compare McTigue and Scottish Gaelic McCaig , which is from the same word, lenited.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Allyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alan  , in Britain generally found only as a surname, but in North America equally common as a given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Allyn Teague was born about 1505, in Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Allen, was 21 and his mother, Eleanor R Burton, was 26. He married Mrs. Allen in 1519, in Dorney, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1584, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

Il a épousé Mrs. Allen en 1519, à Dorney, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1584, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Allyn Teagueが約1505年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアクランフィールドで生まれた時，父Ralph Allenは21歳，母Eleanor R Burtonは26歳であった。1519年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアドールニーでMrs. Allenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1584年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで80歳で死去した。

ko.St Chad,Shrewsbury,Shropshire,England: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이 슈레w스버이 스트 채드
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Allyn Teague(이)가 대략 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 크랜필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Allen(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor R Burton(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 돈이에서 Mrs. Allen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1584년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.St Chad,Shrewsbury,Shropshire,England: шрюсбури ст чэд, шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Allyn Teague родился около 1505 г. в местности кранфиелд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Allen было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor R Burton, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Allen в 1519 г. в местности дорни, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1584 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.

es.St Chad,Shrewsbury,Shropshire,England: Shrewsbury St Chad, Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Allyn Teague nació aproximadamente 1505, en Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Allen, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Eleanor R Burton, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Mrs. Allen en 1519, en Dorney, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1584, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años.
